highlight: The calculator now uses a side-by-side comparison table so you can scan all countries and their tax breakdowns in a single glance.
improvements: Replaced the old column-per-country layout with a structured comparison table: rows are tax categories, columns are destinations, making it easy to compare line items across countries at a glance
Tax breakdown rows (income tax, contributions, credits, etc.) are now collapsible — click a category to expand it and see the individual line items for every country simultaneously
The row-label column stays fixed when you scroll horizontally, so you always know which row you are looking at even with four destinations open
The 'Best' country is highlighted in green across every row of the table, not just the total, making it visually obvious which destination wins
Country configuration now opens in a focused wizard panel (a side sheet on desktop, a bottom drawer on mobile) instead of editing inline, reducing clutter while you compare
The landing page hero section was refreshed with a cleaner feature grid and updated copy
